name: Donnelley Financial Solutions, Inc.
summary: Donnelley Financial Solutions, Inc. (DFIN) provides software and services for financial regulatory compliance and capital markets transactions. The company offers solutions for SEC filing, document management, and compliance reporting. Its products include ActiveDisclosure and Arc Suite platforms, serving clients such as investment companies, public corporations, and financial institutions with technology-enabled compliance and regulatory filing solutions.

products.name: ActiveDisclosure
products.description: A platform for financial regulatory filing and disclosure management for public companies.

products.name: Arc Suite
products.description: A suite of solutions for investment company compliance, reporting, and regulatory filing.
